_meta.purpose: Public slice of the BB-879882 per-chain OUT-counterparty Dune enumeration. Mirrored from the case-side working receipt; restricted to the three OUT rows on POL/ARB/OP that establish the 1-CP-per-chain pattern and identify the single recipient as Zonda 5 (`0x6edf968d…5048`).
_meta.method: Dune SQL aggregation over tokens_<chain>.transfers with amount_usd >= 1 hygiene filter; grouped by (chain, direction, counterparty).
